testcase.name: test_yields_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Yields endpoint failed: 404 assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter129_chef_gio_beo_review.py:186: in test_yields_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Yields endpoint failed: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Yields endpoint failed: 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
